setup.title: Setup
setup.subtitle: Saturday morning, first dinner of the month

phases.name: UNPACK
items: Open boxes, sort by category (Sam unloaded Friday night, staged in garden shed + swan house)
Alcohol → fridge or cellar
Dry goods → garden shed, cellar, or swan house
Glassware / dishes → garden shed
Stack empty boxes for the return trip — do not break down

phases.name: PLATEWARE
items: Check the app for the day's plateware, silverware, and guest count
Pull required dishes from Swan House; anything dirty → dish pit for Yoshi
Polish, organize into milk crates by course
Stage crates on the dining room table in the Main House

phases.name: BAR
items: Re-write the chalkboard: cocktails, white + red by name, NA / mocktail options
Ice well filled with potable ice
Second cooler stocked: Prosecco + heavy cocktail ingredients
Pull working bar stock
Brew coffee at 2:30 — the pods keep it hot through service

phases.name: GLASSWARE TABLE
items: Restock any missing pieces from boxes / swan house
Polish anything that came back dull
Re-group by type if mixed

phases.name: PERGOLA + TABLE
items: Walk the pergola — no new wasp nests or nature issues since last week
Vines not falling onto the table; shades in good shape
Wipe down chairs and table
Linens folded
Plates set
First-course silverware set
Wine and water glasses
Place card blocks set — parties of 4+ have block + card pre-placed; everyone else's block goes empty (guests drop their own card in when they choose a seat)

phases.name: SERVICE STATIONS
items: Gate-side service table set: bus tubs, water carafes, extra linens, extra silverware
Trash cans out of guest sightlines
Water bottle backstock in the garden shed
Whites and rosé chilling in garden shed reach-in or cellar
Reds out of boxes, ready to grab

phases.name: BATHROOM
items: Restock towels
Refill hot soap water
Refill cool hand rinse water
Refill sanitizer
Put out the bathroom sign

phases.name: FRESH TALK
items: Sit down with Sam — Fresh Talk + wine notes in the app, walk through any questions
Pour and taste both wines

phases.name: FINAL WALK
phases.subtitle: T-minus 30 min
items: Light candles; walk the bar, bathroom, parking lot — once-over everything

columns.name: SATURDAY CLOSEOUT
columns.subtitle: Light reset — property stays set for Sunday

phases.name: TABLE
items: Florals stay on the table
Candles + hurricane lamps → garden shed
Wipe around each place setting

phases.name: BAR
items: All bottles back to the fridge
Open cooler drain plugs
Chalkboard stays as is

phases.name: GLASSWARE + PLATEWARE
items: Clean glassware → polished-glassware table in the garden shed
Used plates → washed by Yoshi → polished
Re-crate by course, adjust quantity for Sunday's count → Main House dining room table

phases.name: CLEANUP
items: Bus pergola tables, wipe down chairs
Garbage to the truck
Kitchen wiped down, furniture clean
Self walk — everything in its home

phases.name: TABLE
items: Strip linens
Wipe down full table
Candles + hurricane lamps → garden shed

phases.name: BAR
items: All bottles back to the fridge
Empty coolers, dump ice, leave on the cook line by the bar
Break down bar → bar crate (tools, garnish bowls, napkins) → Swan House

phases.name: GLASSWARE + PLATEWARE
items: Glassware → washed → polished → Swan House
Plates → washed → polished → back into the milk crates they arrived in → Swan House (keep separate from unused plateware stored there)
Silverware → washed → into gray silverware trays → saran-wrapped → Swan House
Wine → fridge, cellar, or wherever Mom + Dad want it (only goes back to the restaurant if Sam calls a wine-list change)

phases.name: CLEANUP
items: Bus pergola tables, wipe down chairs
Garbage to the truck
Kitchen wiped down, furniture clean
Self walk — everything in its home

standards.title: Standards
standards.subtitle: What to expect, what to bring, who to call

sections.name: DRESS CODE
items: Farm casual
Shoes comfortable for 8–10 hours and OK getting muddy
Apron
Wine key
Be prepared for any weather
Jacket for the end of the night

sections.name: ARRIVAL & TIMING
items: Saturday: noon (sometimes later if there's less to do)
Sunday: 1pm (sometimes later)
Guests arrive: 3:30
Sit down: 4:30
First course: 4:45 (after wine is poured)

items.def: storage for dishes, glassware, silverware between dinners
dry-good storage, service-side backstock, polished-glassware table, reach-in fridge
long wooden table between the two houses, green egg + propane built in, chalkboard behind
small house by the parking lot
by the farm stand, outdoor handwashing station

sections.name: THE CHECK-IN APP
sections.text: Has everything you need: menu, drinks, guests, timing. Read the Fresh Talk section before every service.
